variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 5066 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 5066 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 5066 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson P782811 Air Filter, Panel Ventilation | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 5066
variants.description: Why Choose Donaldson Cabin Air Filters? Filter irritants before they enter the vehicle cab to help operators breathe cleaner air. • High quality construction and tested to industry standards. • Durable, dependable and long-lasting. • Designed as a direct replacement for many OE applications.

variants.title: Mann Filter CU 2184 Cabin Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 5066
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER cabin filters offer almost 100% protection against particles such as pollen, diesel soot and tyre abrasion - for a feel-good climate in the vehicle interior and protection of the air conditioning system. Exact fit and perfect tightness ensure constant filtration performance during the entire service interval / Optimum vehicle interior ventilation due to the high air flow capacity.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF25305 Cabin Air Filter Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 5066
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF25305 panel cabin air filter provides clean air in the cab which means a clean work environment.  Breathing cleaner air can lead to longer and more productive working hours.
